description: Database for Android and JVM - first and fast, lightweight on-device vector database
A lightweight vector database implementation using SQLite.
Zero-dependency PHP vector database with Matryoshka search — lightweight alternative to sqlite-vec

Claude Code orchestrates multiple LLMs as agents. All agent memory and decisions are stored persistently in a lightweight SQLite database. Optional semantic vector search (via sqlite-vec) enhances memory retrieval with natural-language queries.
A lightweight Flask-based MBTiles server for serving vector tiles from MBTiles databases, with a Leaflet frontend for map visualization and custom zoom-dependent styles

PocketVec is a lightweight, local vector database built on PyTorch with novel adaptive search. It runs entirely on your machine using .pt and SQLite files, and includes a FastAPI wrapper for easy integration into scripts, notebooks, or small services
